keep.reason: Top applied skim hook: it gives practitioners the computable AIC/BIC correction, scoped to complete-data-equivalent selection.
Kept as the mathematical foundation; the estimated-scale and complete-data MLE conditions avoid the known-scale overclaim.
Kept as the main guardrail: use the correction for criteria or numerator uses without a calibrated reference, but do not double-correct Chan-calibrated LRTs.
Kept as a first-class workflow contribution, scoped to the documented provenance and audit gates in this study rather than a universal validation of AI.
Kept to state the IC-specific theoretical contribution separately from the applied instruction in K09: the centering bias is model-specific.
Kept because it replaces the tempting but wrong naive trace difference with the projected missing-information quantity at the null.
Kept as the second workflow-facing applied implication, translating the study design into an audit checklist for applied teams.
Kept at lower priority as a distinct actionable LRT implementation point, tightly scoped to nested null and local-alternative comparisons.
